_comment: Hero data. Faction troops: Blood Rose=Assaulter, Wings of Dawn=Shooter, Guard of Order=Rider. Portrait source: lastzwiki.com (pattern: img-heroe-{name}2.webp with exceptions). Sources: lastzguides.com/heroes.html, allclash.com. pvpRating/pveRating sourced from klzguide.vercel.app 2026-05. Skills: confirmed for Bella/Selena/Nyx; others based on in-game patterns.

skills.name: Crimson Dominion
